body: PT Erajaya Swasembada Tbk (ERAA) has formed a joint venture, PT Mitra Belanja Selalu, with PT Perjuangan Anak Muda, investing IDR 52.22 billion for a 51% stake. As of June 30, 2024, ERAA holds a solid cash position of IDR 1.49 trillion, with total assets of IDR 23.78 trillion and equity of IDR 8.46 trillion.
title: Erajaya Swasembada forms joint venture with Perjuangan Anak Muda to establish management consultancy service provider.

body: PT Astra Agro Lestari Tbk (AALI) reported a net profit of IDR 801.15 billion in Q3 2024, a slight increase from IDR 800.57 billion, driven by a revenue surge of IDR 16.28 trillion, up from IDR 15.68 trillion in the same period last year. The company's gross profit also increased to IDR 2 trillion, with unrefined palm oil and its byproducts generating the highest sales of IDR 15.09 trillion, accounting for 81% of total sales from third-party users.
title: Astra Agro Lestari's Net Profit Rises Slightly to IDR 801.15 Billion in Q3 2024 on Revenue Surge.

body: PT Aneka Tambang Tbk (ANTM) will provide a shareholder loan facility of IDR 124.8 billion to its affiliate, PT Feni Haltim (FHT), to support nickel downstreaming projects, including the development of an integrated battery ecosystem. The loan, with an interest rate of 7.02% per annum, aims to increase the added value of the company's nickel production.
title: Aneka Tambang to Provide Idr 124.8 Billion Loan to Affiliate PT Feni Haltim for Nickel Downstreaming Projects.

body: Foreign investors sold a net 1.09 billion shares, with PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) experiencing the largest net sale of 262 million shares, followed by PT Bumi Resources Tbk (BUMI) with a net sale of 303.64 million shares. Meanwhile, PT Pakuwon Jati Tbk (PWON) saw the largest net purchase of 41.29 million shares, followed by PT Buana Lintas Lautan Tbk (BULL) with a net purchase of 31.81 million shares.
title: Foreign investors sell more shares than they buy in Indonesian market, led by digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia TBK.

body: The Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) closed at 7,604.56, down from its morning high of 7,662.77, with other indices such as LQ45, IDX30, IDX80, and IDXESGL also experiencing declines. Several major stocks, including PT Bank Central Asia Tbk, PT Astra International Tbk, and PT Telkom Indonesia Tbk, saw downturns, while others like PT Garudafood Putra Putri Jaya Tbk and PT Indofood Sukses Makmur Tbk experienced increases.
title: Jakarta Composite Index Closes at 7,604.56, Down from Morning High Amid Mixed Stock Performance.

body: PT BFI Finance Tbk (BFIN) reported IDR 14.2 trillion in new distributed financing as of September 2024, with a 19.1% quarter-to-quarter growth in Q3 2024, and managed receivables of IDR 24.1 trillion, 5% higher year-on-year. The company maintained a healthy credit quality with a gross non-performing financing ratio of 1.42% and a net NPF ratio of 0.27%, and achieved a net profit of IDR 1.1 trillion in 9M 2024, supported by revenue of IDR 4.7 trillion.
title: PT BFI Finance reports 19.1% quarter-to-quarter growth in new financing disbursed in Q3 2024, reaching IDR 14.2 trillion.

body: PT Adi Sarana Armada Tbk (ASSA) reported a 79.82% year-on-year increase in net profit to IDR 212.67 billion in Q3 2024, driven by a 28.24% surge in gross profit to IDR 1.07 trillion and a 98.88% jump in operating profit. The company's revenue rose to IDR 3.64 trillion, with the passenger car lease autopool segment contributing 32.87% to total revenue, and other segments such as delivery service, used vehicles, logistics, and auction also showing significant growth.
title: PT Adi Sarana Armada's Net Profit Surges 79.82% in Q3 2024, Driven by Strong Performance in Passenger Car Lease and Autopool Segments.

body: PT Pakuwon Jati Tbk (PWON) reported a 11.76% year-on-year revenue growth to IDR 4.78 trillion in Q3 2024, driven by user contracts and space lease services, with gross profit increasing to IDR 2.71 trillion and net profit rising to IDR 1.66 trillion. The company's total assets grew to IDR 34.51 trillion, while total liabilities increased to IDR 24.98 trillion, with a gross profit margin improving to 56.78% from 54.96%.
title: PT Pakuwon Jati TBK reports 11.76% revenue growth and 4.74% profit growth in Q3 2024.

body: PT Aneka Tambang Tbk (ANTM) has formed a strategic partnership with PT Perusahaan Listrik Negara to provide a 150 megavolt ampere electricity supply to its ferronickel smelting facility in Pomalaa, Southeast Sulawesi, supporting the company's transition to a greener power plant and reducing carbon emissions. The facility, which has a production capacity of 27,000 tons of nickel ferronickel per year, is a key infrastructure in ANTM's mineral downstreaming chain and will contribute to Indonesia's national endeavor to achieve net zero emissions by 2060.
title: ANTAM forms partnership with PLN to power ferronickel smelting facility with greener electricity supply.

body: PT Baramulti Suksessarana Tbk (BSSR) has announced an interim dividend of USD 30 million for fiscal year 2024, a 50% increase from USD 20 million in FY 2023, with a dividend per share of USD 0.1146. The dividend will be paid on November 21, 2024, based on the company's financial report as of June 30, 2024, which showed a net profit of USD 80.35 million, unrestricted retained earnings of USD 191.59 million, and total equity of USD 167.81 million.
title: PT Baramulti Suksessarana TBK Increases Interim Dividend by 50% to USD 30 Million for Fiscal Year 2024.
